title: Client Login | Psychology Direct
description: Access your case details, documents, and reports. Log in to the Psychology Direct client portal.

blocks.headline: Access Your Case Portal
blocks.subtitle: Access your case details, documents, and updates on your Psychology Direct account.

blocks.heading: What You Can Access in Your Portal

cards.title: Case Details
cards.description: View your case timeline, key dates, and status updates. See all assessments, reports, and documents.

cards.title: Communications
cards.description: Message your dedicated Client Manager directly. Get answers to questions and coordinate assessments.

cards.title: Documents
cards.description: Download completed reports, CVs, quotes, and other documents related to your case.

cards.title: Invoicing
cards.description: View invoices and payment status. Manage billing and inquiries.

cards.title: Notifications
cards.description: Receive alerts about important updates, report completion, or assessment scheduling.

blocks.text: First time logging in? You should have received credentials when your case was assigned. Check your email from enquiries@psychologydirect.co.uk.

faqs.question: Where do I log in?
faqs.answer: Click the Log In to Portal button above. You'll access our secure Zoho Projects portal.

faqs.question: What are my login credentials?
faqs.answer: You should have received login instructions when your case was assigned. Check your email, including spam. If missing, see the help section below.

faqs.question: I've forgotten my password. How do I reset it?
faqs.answer: On the Zoho login page, click Forgot your password? You'll receive an email with password reset instructions.

faqs.question: I don't have login credentials. Who do I contact?
faqs.answer: Email enquiries@psychologydirect.co.uk with your organisation name and case reference. We'll send you login details immediately.

faqs.question: Can I access the portal on my phone?
faqs.answer: Yes. The portal is mobile-responsive and works on all devices including iPhone, Android, tablet, and desktop.

faqs.question: I get an error when I try to log in. What should I do?
faqs.answer: First, check email and password are correct. If the error persists, try clearing cache and cookies, a different browser, or a different device. Contact us if it continues: enquiries@psychologydirect.co.uk or 01306 879 975.

faqs.question: What information can I see in the portal?
faqs.answer: You can see case details, timeline, assessment scheduling, reports, invoices, and message your Client Manager. You cannot see other clients' cases.

faqs.question: Is the portal secure?
faqs.answer: Yes. The portal uses encrypted connections and follows GDPR standards. Case information is protected and visible only to authorised users.

faqs.question: Can I download reports from the portal?
faqs.answer: Yes. All completed reports are available for download as PDFs. You can also access assessment notes and other documentation related to your case.

blocks.heading: Need Support Logging In?
blocks.bodyText: If you're having trouble accessing the portal or need login credentials, our team is here to help.
